result.summary: Found 3 issues: one major data display bug, one major layout truncation issue, and one minor navigation truncation issue.

issues.description: The 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' section displays a badge showing '0 Games' even though multiple exclusive game tiles are clearly visible below it.
issues.suggestion: Fix the game count logic to correctly count and display the number of exclusive games available. This appears to be a data-fetching or rendering bug where the count is not syncing with the displayed games.

issues.description: Game tiles in the right column are visually clipped/cropped, showing partial game titles such as 'MAGNI PHO...' and 'MUNC MI...' with no clear affordance that they are horizontally scrollable. Similarly, bottom row game cards like 'HYPERA...' and 'DAR WATE...' are cut off.
issues.suggestion: Add a visible scroll indicator, gradient fade, or partial card reveal with a clear horizontal scroll cue to communicate to users that more content is available. Alternatively, ensure proper overflow handling and visible scroll bars.

issues.description: The top navigation tab 'Hot Ga...' is truncated without a clear indication that it is part of a scrollable row.
issues.suggestion: Add a fade-out effect or scroll arrow on the right side of the navigation tab bar to indicate that more tabs are available via horizontal scrolling.
